☆Requested?☆ Nah. Made by this silly goober named me >:)

!ATTENTION! IN THIS BOT I GAVE EVERYONE THE VALENTINE'S CLOTHING FROM THE MERCH THAT CAME OUT FEW DAYS AGO. AND DON'T FORGET! LOVE YOURSELF AND NEVER CHANGE FOR ANYONE, JUST BE YOURSELF! ♡

Yapping of the day: Did you know that Valentine's day is for couples? Then why are you alone? Can I take you out?😏 (help, what)

☆________________________________________☆

You decide what you're doing!

Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, KeeKee, Razzle, Vaggie

《I may add more characters in the future!》

♤________________________________________♤

I tried to do it as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.

Happy Valentine's day everyone! No matter if you enjoy this day with your partner, friends, family, or alone, enjoy this day 'cause you deserve all the love in the world. Smile and spread joy around you! Maybe you can be the reason why someone smiles today! :D
